en: "You shall not make idols for yourselves or erect an image or pillar, and you shall not set up a figured stone in your land to bow down to it, for I am the LORD your God.
zh: “你們不可為自己做偶像，不可為自己立雕像或神柱，也不可在你們的境內安置石像，向它跪拜；因為我是耶和華你們的 神。

en: You shall keep my Sabbaths and reverence my sanctuary: I am the LORD.
zh: 你們要遵守我的安息日；敬畏我的聖所；我是耶和華。

en: "If you walk in my statutes and observe my commandments and do them,
zh: 你們遵行我的律例，謹守我的誡命，遵照奉行，

en: then I will give you your rains in their season, and the land shall yield its increase, and the trees of the field shall yield their fruit.
zh: 我就按時給你們降下雨露，使地生出土產，田野的樹木也結果實。

en: Your threshing shall last to the time of the grape harvest, and the grape harvest shall last to the time for sowing. And you shall eat your bread to the full and dwell in your land securely.
zh: 你們打禾，必打到摘葡萄的時候，摘葡萄必摘到撒種的時候；你們吃食物，吃得飽足，在你們的境內安然居住。

en: I will give peace in the land, and you shall lie down, and none shall make you afraid. And I will remove harmful beasts from the land, and the sword shall not go through your land.
zh: 我必使你們境內太平；你們睡覺，沒有人驚嚇你們；我使惡獸在境內絕跡；刀劍也不經過你們的地。

en: You shall chase your enemies, and they shall fall before you by the sword.
zh: 你們必追趕仇敵，他們必在你們面前倒在刀下。

en: Five of you shall chase a hundred, and a hundred of you shall chase ten thousand, and your enemies shall fall before you by the sword.
zh: 你們五個人必追趕一百人，一百人必追趕一萬人；你們的仇敵必在你們面前倒在刀下。

en: I will turn to you and make you fruitful and multiply you and will confirm my covenant with you.
zh: 我眷顧你們，使你們繁衍增多，也必堅立我與你們所立的約。

en: You shall eat old store long kept, and you shall clear out the old to make way for the new.
zh: 你們吃久藏的舊糧，要挪出舊糧，騰空給新糧。

en: I will make my dwelling among you, and my soul shall not abhor you.
zh: 我必在你們中間安置我的居所，我的心也不厭棄你們。

en: And I will walk among you and will be your God, and you shall be my people.
zh: 我要在你們中間行走；我要作你們的 神，你們要作我的子民。

en: I am the LORD your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, that you should not be their slaves. And I have broken the bars of your yoke and made you walk erect.
zh: 我是耶和華你們的 神，曾經把你們從埃及地領出來，使你們不再作他們的奴僕；我折斷了你們所負的軛，使你們挺身昂首地行走。

en: "But if you will not listen to me and will not do all these commandments,
zh: “但如果你們不聽從我，不遵行這一切誡命；

en: if you spurn my statutes, and if your soul abhors my rules, so that you will not do all my commandments, but break my covenant,
zh: 如果你們棄絕我的律例，你們的心厭棄我的典章，不遵行我的一切誡命，違背我的約，

en: then I will do this to you: I will visit you with panic, with wasting disease and fever that consume the eyes and make the heart ache. And you shall sow your seed in vain, for your enemies shall eat it.
zh: 我就要這樣待你們：我必命驚慌臨到你們，癆病熱病使你們眼目昏花，心靈憔悴；你們必徒然撒種，因為你們的仇敵必吃盡你們的出產。

en: I will set my face against you, and you shall be struck down before your enemies. Those who hate you shall rule over you, and you shall flee when none pursues you.
zh: 我向你們變臉，你們就敗在仇敵面前；恨惡你們的要管轄你們；雖然沒有人追趕，你們仍然逃跑。

en: And if in spite of this you will not listen to me, then I will discipline you again sevenfold for your sins,
zh: 經過這些以後，如果你們還不聽從我，我就要因你們的罪加重七倍管教你們。

en: and I will break the pride of your power, and I will make your heavens like iron and your earth like bronze.
zh: 我必粉碎你們誇耀的力量；我要使你們的天像鐵，你們的地像銅；

en: And your strength shall be spent in vain, for your land shall not yield its increase, and the trees of the land shall not yield their fruit.
zh: 你們的氣力徒然用盡；你們的地不出產，境內的樹也不結果實。

en: "Then if you walk contrary to me and will not listen to me, I will continue striking you, sevenfold for your sins.
zh: “如果你們行事為人與我的心意相違，不肯聽從我，我就要按著你們的罪，使災禍加重七倍地臨到你們。

en: And I will let loose the wild beasts against you, which shall bereave you of your children and destroy your livestock and make you few in number, so that your roads shall be deserted.
zh: 打發野地的走獸到你們中間，奪去你們的兒女，殘害你們的牲畜，減少你們的人口，使你們的道路荒涼。

en: "And if by this discipline you are not turned to me but walk contrary to me,
zh: “但如果你們經過這些事仍然不歸向我，行事仍與我的心意相違，

en: then I also will walk contrary to you, and I myself will strike you sevenfold for your sins.
zh: 我也要與你們作對，按著你們的罪，再加重七倍擊打你們；

en: And I will bring a sword upon you, that shall execute vengeance for the covenant. And if you gather within your cities, I will send pestilence among you, and you shall be delivered into the hand of the enemy.
zh: 使刀劍臨到你們，報復背約的仇；聚集你們到城裡，好使我打發瘟疫在你們中間，把你們交在仇敵的手裡。

en: When I break your supply of bread, ten women shall bake your bread in a single oven and shall dole out your bread again by weight, and you shall eat and not be satisfied.
zh: 我斷絕你們的糧食來源 以後，十個女人要共用一個爐子給你們烤餅，她們配給定量的餅給你們；你們要吃，卻吃不飽。

en: "But if in spite of this you will not listen to me, but walk contrary to me,
zh: “如果你們經過這事，還是不聽從我，行事仍與我的心意相違，

en: then I will walk contrary to you in fury, and I myself will discipline you sevenfold for your sins.
zh: 我就必發烈怒，與你們作對；我要按著你們的罪，再加重七倍管教你們。

en: You shall eat the flesh of your sons, and you shall eat the flesh of your daughters.
zh: 你們要吃自己兒子的肉，女兒的肉也要吃。

en: And I will destroy your high places and cut down your incense altars and cast your dead bodies upon the dead bodies of your idols, and my soul will abhor you.
zh: 我必毀壞你們的邱壇，砍倒你們的香壇，把你們的屍體扔在你們仆倒的偶像上面；我的心必厭棄你們。

en: And I will lay your cities waste and will make your sanctuaries desolate, and I will not smell your pleasing aromas.
zh: 我必使你們的城市變為荒場，使你們的聖所荒涼；我也不聞你們馨香的祭。

en: And I myself will devastate the land, so that your enemies who settle in it shall be appalled at it.
zh: 我要使地荒涼，連住在那裡的仇敵也驚奇。

en: And I will scatter you among the nations, and I will unsheathe the sword after you, and your land shall be a desolation, and your cities shall be a waste.
zh: 我要把你們分散在萬國中，我又拔出刀來追趕你們；你們的地成為荒涼，你們的城市變成荒場。

en: "Then the land shall enjoy its Sabbaths as long as it lies desolate, while you are in your enemies' land; then the land shall rest, and enjoy its Sabbaths.
zh: “當那地荒涼，你們又住在仇敵之地的時候，地就享受安息；那地要休歇，享受安息。

en: As long as it lies desolate it shall have rest, the rest that it did not have on your Sabbaths when you were dwelling in it.
zh: 因為你們居住在那裡的時候，地不能在你們的安息年中享受安息，唯有在荒涼的日子，才可享安息。

en: And as for those of you who are left, I will send faintness into their hearts in the lands of their enemies. The sound of a driven leaf shall put them to flight, and they shall flee as one flees from the sword, and they shall fall when none pursues.
zh: 至於你們剩下的人，我必使他們在仇敵之地膽戰心驚；風吹落葉也會嚇跑他們；他們必逃跑，好像逃避刀劍一樣；雖然無人追趕，他們卻跌倒。

en: They shall stumble over one another, as if to escape a sword, though none pursues. And you shall have no power to stand before your enemies.
zh: 雖然無人追趕，他們卻像面臨刀劍，彼此撞跌；你們在仇敵面前，不能站立得住。

en: And you shall perish among the nations, and the land of your enemies shall eat you up.
zh: 你們要在萬國中滅亡；仇敵之地必吞滅你們。

en: And those of you who are left shall rot away in your enemies' lands because of their iniquity, and also because of the iniquities of their fathers they shall rot away like them.
zh: 你們剩下的人，必因自己的罪孽在仇敵之地消滅，也因犯了祖先的罪孽日漸衰弱。

en: "But if they confess their iniquity and the iniquity of their fathers in their treachery that they committed against me, and also in walking contrary to me,
zh: “那時他們就會承認自己的罪孽和他們祖先的罪孽，就是他們對我不忠的過犯，又承認因為行事與我的心意相違，

en: so that I walked contrary to them and brought them into the land of their enemies- if then their uncircumcised heart is humbled and they make amends for their iniquity,
zh: 以致我也與他們作對，把他們帶到他們的仇敵之地。如果他們未受割禮的心這樣謙卑下來，情願接受他們罪孽的刑罰，

en: then I will remember my covenant with Jacob, and I will remember my covenant with Isaac and my covenant with Abraham, and I will remember the land.
zh: 我就記念我與雅各所立的約，記念我與以撒所立的約，與亞伯拉罕所立的約；我也記念這地。

en: But the land shall be abandoned by them and enjoy its Sabbaths while it lies desolate without them, and they shall make amends for their iniquity, because they spurned my rules and their soul abhorred my statutes.
zh: 他們會離開這地，地在荒涼無人的時候，就可以享受安息，同時他們要接受他們罪孽的刑罰，因為他們棄絕了我的典章，他們的心厭棄了我的律例。

en: Yet for all that, when they are in the land of their enemies, I will not spurn them, neither will I abhor them so as to destroy them utterly and break my covenant with them, for I am the LORD their God.
zh: 雖然這樣，他們住在仇敵之地的時候，我還是不棄絕他們，也不厭棄他們，不把他們滅絕，我不會違背我與他們所立的約；因為我是耶和華他們的 神。

en: But I will for their sake remember the covenant with their forefathers, whom I brought out of the land of Egypt in the sight of the nations, that I might be their God: I am the LORD."
zh: 因為他們的緣故，我要記念我與他們祖先所立的約；他們的祖先是我在列國眼前，從埃及地領出來的，為要作他們的 神；我是耶和華。”

en: These are the statutes and rules and laws that the LORD made between him and the people of Israel through Moses on Mount Sinai.
zh: 這些是耶和華在西奈山，藉著摩西頒布他和以色列人之間的律例、典章和法則。
